nodes.summary: blueprint-init-repo MUST keep apps/descriptor.yaml and infra/gitops/platform/base/apps/kustomization.yaml membership-consistent after force-init
blueprint-init-repo MUST NOT leave a half-reseeded descriptor/kustomization pair unless provably membership-consistent
blueprint-template-smoke MUST exercise the v1.8.0-shaped consumer kustomization scenario and exit 0
quality-ci-generated-consumer-smoke MUST exit 0 in CI after the fix ships
Fix MUST NOT introduce file-write paths outside the contract-declared init scope
Init flow MUST emit log_info per newly-seeded file with relative path and template source
Force-init MUST be idempotent across consecutive runs
Fix MUST require no consumer-side action beyond standard upgrade sequence
Upgrade against v1.8.0-shaped consumer fixture exits 0; no membership errors
Unit test asserts post-force-init descriptor+kustomization satisfy validate_app_descriptor with zero errors
make quality-ci-generated-consumer-smoke and make blueprint-template-smoke exit 0 in CI
Contract drift unit test asserts blueprint/contract.yaml init scope covers every force-reseeded path
